{% extends 'base.html' %} {% load static %} {% block title %}Receive Purchase Order{% endblock %} {% block content %}

Receive Purchase Order: {{ order.po_number }}

This will create an inbound transaction and update inventory for all items in this purchase order.
Order Summary
Vendor: {{ order.vendor.name }}
Order Date: {{ order.order_date|date:"Y-m-d" }}
Expected Delivery: {{ order.expected_delivery|date:"Y-m-d"|default:"-" }}
Status: {% if order.status == 'draft' %} Draft {% elif order.status == 'sent' %} Sent {% elif order.status == 'confirmed' %} Confirmed {% elif order.status == 'shipped' %} Shipped {% elif order.status == 'delivered' %} Delivered {% elif order.status == 'cancelled' %} Cancelled {% endif %}
Total Items: {{ items|length }}
Items to Receive
{% for item in items %} {% endfor %}
Material Ordered Quantity Unit Price Line Total Current Stock Stock After
{{ item.material.name }} ({{ item.material.material_code }}) {{ item.quantity }} {{ item.material.unit }} ${{ item.unit_price|floatformat:2 }} ${{ item.line_total|floatformat:2 }} {{ item.material.current_stock }} {{ item.material.current_stock|add:item.quantity }}
Subtotal: ${{ order.subtotal|floatformat:2 }}
Tax (10%): ${{ order.tax|floatformat:2 }}
Total: ${{ order.total|floatformat:2 }}
{% csrf_token %}
Back
